name: travel-cn
examples_zh: 帮我在去哪儿、携程、飞猪上比较 6 月 20 日上海到成都的机票价格和起飞时间。
查杭州西湖附近 7 月 5 日入住两晚的酒店，按携程和飞猪价格对比。
查询北京到西安明天的高铁票和兵马俑景区门票信息。
examples_en: Compare June 20 flight prices and departure times from Shanghai to Chengdu across Qunar, Ctrip, and Fliggy.
Search hotels near West Lake in Hangzhou for two nights from July 5 and compare Ctrip and Fliggy prices.
Check tomorrow's Beijing to Xi'an high-speed train tickets and Terracotta Warriors attraction ticket options.
